mapper.select:
SELECT /* /order/selectOrderTempListCount : McpOrderMapper.selectOrderTempListCount */ COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_REQUEST_TEMP@DL_MCP A , NMCP_REQUEST_CSTMR_TEMP@DL_MCP B , MCP_REQUEST_STATE@DL_MCP C , NMCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO_TEMP@DL_MCP D , NMCP_REQUEST_DLVRY_TEMP@DL_MCP E , NMCP_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP F , NMCP_REQUEST_APD_TEMP@DL_MCP G , NMCP_REQUEST_APD_SALEINFO_TEMP@DL_MCP H WHERE 1=1
AND( (B.CSTMR_NAME = #{cstmrName} AND B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN = #{cstmrMobileFn}||#{cstmrMobileMn}||#{cstmrMobileRn} ) OR ( E.DLVRY_NAME = #{cstmrName} AND E.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN || E.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN || E.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN = #{cstmrMobileFn}||#{cstmrMobileMn}||#{cstmrMobileRn} ))
AND A.CRET_ID = #{cretId}
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.PROD_ID = F.PROD_ID(+) AND A.TMP_STEP <> '00'

SELECT /* /order/selectOrderTempList : McpOrderMapper.selectOrderTempPageList */ NVL2(G.REQUEST_KEY,'SELF','UM') AS TEMP_TYPE , A.REQUEST_KEY , A.RES_NO , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , A.PROD_ID , B.CSTMR_NAME , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN , B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN , NVL(A.REQUEST_STATE_CODE,(SELECT REQUEST_STATE_CODE FROM NMCP_REQUEST_TEMP@DL_MCP TMP WHERE TMP.REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY )) AS REQUEST_STATE_CODE , NVL(A.PSTATE,(SELECT PSTATE FROM NMCP_REQUEST_TEMP@DL_MCP TMP WHERE TMP.REQUEST_KEY = A.REQUEST_KEY )) AS PSTATE , TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE,'YYYY.MM.DD') AS SYS_RDATE , NVL(D.MODEL_PRICE,0) AS MODEL_PRICE , NVL(D.SETTL_AMT,0) AS SETTL_AMT , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE,'MM',F.PROD_NM ,'UU','유심')AS PROD_NM , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE,'MM',F.LIST_SHOW_TEXT, 'UU', (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD=D.SOC_CODE) ) AS LIST_SHOW_TEXT , A.SNTY_COLOR_CD , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE,'MM', (SELECT IMG_PATH FROM NMCP_PROD_IMG_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE PROD_ID = F.PROD_ID AND A.SNTY_COLOR_CD = SNTY_COLOR_CD AND IMG_TYPE_CD='01') ,'UU', (SELECT IMG_PATH FROM NMCP_USIM_BAS WHERE DATA_TYPE = (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD=D.SOC_CODE) AND ROWNUM = 1) ) AS IMG_PATH , (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD=D.SOC_CODE)AS RATE_NM , (SELECT DATA_TYPE FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD=D.SOC_CODE)AS PRDT_SCTN_CD , NVL(A.PROD_TYPE,'01')AS PROD_TYPE , NVL((SELECT BAS.ATRIB_VAL_NM_1 FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP BAS WHERE BAS.PROD_ID = A.PROD_ID AND BAS.HNDSET_MODEL_ID = D.MODEL_ID AND ROWNUM =1) , (SELECT BAS.ATRIB_VAL_NM_1 FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP BAS WHERE BAS.PROD_ID = A.PROD_ID AND ROWNUM =1)) AS ATRIB_VAL_NM_ONE , NVL((SELECT BAS.ATRIB_VAL_NM_2 FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP BAS WHERE BAS.PROD_ID = A.PROD_ID AND BAS.HNDSET_MODEL_ID = D.MODEL_ID AND ROWNUM =1) , (SELECT BAS.ATRIB_VAL_NM_2 FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP BAS WHERE BAS.PROD_ID = A.PROD_ID AND ROWNUM =1)) AS ATRIB_VAL_NM_TWO , A.TMP_STEP , 'N' AS SELF_YN , A.ON_OFF_TYPE , DECODE(NVL(F.SESPLS_YN,'N'),'Y','자급제',DECODE(F.PROD_TYPE,'04','중고폰','공시지원금 단말') ) AS PHONE_CTG_LABEL , DECODE(A.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'UU', 'Y' , DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_SNTY_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP BAS WHERE BAS.PROD_ID = A.PROD_ID AND BAS.HNDSET_MODEL_ID = D.MODEL_ID AND BAS.SALE_YN = 'Y' AND NVL(BAS.SDOUT_YN,'Y') <> 'N'),0,'N','Y') ) AS PHONE_SALE_YN , NVL2(G.REQUEST_KEY, F.PROD_NM, '') AS SELF_PROD_NM , A.USIM_KINDS_CD FROM NMCP_REQUEST_TEMP@DL_MCP A , NMCP_REQUEST_CSTMR_TEMP@DL_MCP B , NMCP_REQUEST_SALEINFO_TEMP@DL_MCP D , NMCP_REQUEST_DLVRY_TEMP@DL_MCP E , NMCP_PROD_BAS@DL_MCP F , NMCP_REQUEST_APD_TEMP@DL_MCP G , NMCP_REQUEST_APD_SALEINFO_TEMP@DL_MCP H WHERE 1=1
AND( (B.CSTMR_NAME = #{cstmrName} AND B.CSTMR_MOBILE_FN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_MN || B.CSTMR_MOBILE_RN = #{cstmrMobileFn}||#{cstmrMobileMn}||#{cstmrMobileRn} ) OR ( E.DLVRY_NAME = #{cstmrName} AND E.DLVRY_MOBILE_FN || E.DLVRY_MOBILE_MN || E.DLVRY_MOBILE_RN = #{cstmrMobileFn}||#{cstmrMobileMn}||#{cstmrMobileRn} ))
AND A.CRET_ID = #{cretId}
AND A.REQUEST_KEY = B.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = D.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = E.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = G.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.REQUEST_KEY = H.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.PROD_ID = F.PROD_ID(+) AND A.TMP_STEP <> '00' ORDER BY REQUEST_KEY DESC
